TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2017 BMW X6.  THE CONTACT RECEIVED NOTIFICATION OF NHTSA CAMPAIGN NUMBER: 19V823000 (CHILD SEAT) HOWEVER, THE PARTS FOR THE RECALL REPAIR WAS NOT YET AVAILABLE. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE MANUFACTURER HAD EXCEEDED A REASONABLE AMOUNT OF TIME FOR THE RECALL

narrative.headline: What 2017 Bmw X6 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 2 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Air Bags (50% of reports).
